title: selaginella uncinata var. arborea
intro: Selaginella uncinata var. arborea, also known as Tree Spikemoss, is a type of fern-like plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Tree Spikemoss include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or applied topically as a poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
